examples: His already infirm body was racked by high fever.
We are here to protect and assist the weak and infirm.
He has neither an infirm mother, nor a whole troop of everlastingly hungry children to torment him.
Every year influenza kills 36, 000 people in the U.S., mostly the very young, very old and very infirm.
The toothless and infirm get shipped off to a horse sanctuary in Bartlesville, Oklahoma.
